1.title:
Explore Fashion Trends
with Trendify
1.description: Dive into the world of fashion with Trendify, where you can discover the latest and hottest styles curated just for you.

2.title:
Your Style, Your Trendify
Experience
2.description: Trendify goes beyond fashion – it's a personalized style journey. Start your fashion adventure with Trendify today.

3.title:
Seamless Fashion,
Seamless Shopping
3.description: Trendify offers an effortless shopping experience, making your style journey smoother than ever.

welcome.title: Let's Get Started!
welcome.subtitle: Let's dive in into your account

sign_up.title: Join Trendify Today
sign_up.subtitle: Embark on a fashion journey tailored for you.

sign_in.title: Welcome Back!
sign_in.subtitle: Sign in to access your personalized fashion.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Your Password?
forgot_password.subtitle: We've got you covered. Enter your registered email to reset your password. We will send an OTP code to your email for the next steps.

otp.title: Enter OTP Code
otp.subtitle: Please check your email inbox for a message from Trendify. Enter the one-time verification code below.
otp.resend_code_in: You can resend the code in

create_password.title: Secure Your Account
create_password.subtitle: Almost there! Create a new password for your Trendify account to keep it secure. Remember to choose a strong and unique password.

reset_success.title: You're All Set!
reset_success.subtitle: Your password has been successfully changed.
